messages.content: Generate a detailed execution plan for this project.

project.title: Client Invoice Tracker
project.one_liner: A lightweight SaaS for freelancers to create and track client invoices
project.core_problem: Freelancers lose hours chasing late payments and manually creating invoices in Word/Excel

success_criteria.criterion: 50 freelancers sign up within 30 days of launch
Average invoice sent within 24h of project completion for active users
